global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a plump, rounded body and a long tail. It features striking black and white plumage with reddish-brown flanks. The bird has a black head, back, and tail, contrasting with a white belly and wing patches. Its eyes are bright red.

part_details.head: Black, rounded with bright red eyes.
part_details.body: Plump, with black upper parts and white underparts.
part_details.tail: Long, black with white outer feathers.

spatial_relations: The black head is above the white belly.
The reddish-brown flanks are on the sides of the white belly.
The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
The white wing patches are on the black wings.
